function_v0.doc:
Match after borrower has pledged collateral. Matcher (`caller`) supplies principal: token
`transfer(from=caller, to=settlement_engine)` then full principal to borrower (no match fee).
Matcher: admin, or (if whitelist empty) any address, or a whitelisted address.

`principal_amount` is the size of the loan being created. Validation:
- **Vault path** (caller is the per-request lending vault): allowed range
`[request.min_principal_amount, request.principal_amount]`. Any value in that band is
accepted; the lending vault enforces who may pick a sub-hard-cap value.
- **EOA / non-vault path**: must equal `request.principal_amount` (full-fund-only).
function_v0.name: match_request

function_v0.doc: Execute a previously proposed upgrade once the timelock has elapsed.
function_v0.name: execute_upgrade

function_v0.doc: Stage an upgrade to be executed after the timelock period (48 h).
function_v0.name: propose_upgrade

function_v0.doc: Lock borrow collateral for an active request (required before `match_request`).
function_v0.name: pledge_collateral

function_v0.doc: Read-only: whether `address` is the configured settlement engine admin (for vault `execute_match` auth).
function_v0.name: is_settlement_admin

function_v0.doc:
Anyone: past funding deadline, vault has zero principal deposits, no LP funds stuck.
Wind down an unmatched borrow request after its funding window has closed.

Permitted at any deposit level \xe2\x80\x94 including soft-cap-met-but-never-matched vaults \xe2\x80\x94 so LPs
aren't stranded when the borrower fails to call `execute_match` before the deadline.
`mark_cancelled` flips the per-request vault to `Closed`, which unblocks LP `redeem`
(LPs receive their principal token deposits pro-rata at par; no loan was ever created).
Pledged collateral, if any, is released back to the borrower.
function_v0.name: expire_unfunded_offer

function_v0.doc: Same economics as borrower cancel; requires processor role and funding deadline + grace elapsed.\nBorrower must also authorize (penalty transfer).
function_v0.name: processor_cancel_offer

function_v0.doc: `0` disables the check. Requires `oracle_address` on the request when above zero.
function_v0.name: set_min_collateral_ratio_bps

function_v0.doc: Pre-match: ACTIVE request with pledged collateral, pooled vault with LP shares, **LiquidatorBuyout** policy.\nLiquidator pays principal (anchor/LTV/surplus + fee split); receives pledged collateral; request cancelled.
function_v0.name: liquidator_settle_active_request

fields.doc: Address that supplied principal at match (EOA, lending vault, or other contract).
fields.name: lender

udt_union_v0.doc: SEP-040-style asset id for oracle `lastprice` (Stellar smart-contract / SAC token).
udt_union_v0.name: OracleAsset

fields.doc: Soft cap (in underlying smallest units). Equals `max_capacity` when the request had no\nsoft cap configured. `lending_vault::execute_match` allows borrower-only match when\n`min_capacity <= total_assets < max_capacity`.
fields.name: min_capacity

fields.doc: Loan-to-value at offer (basis points, e.g. 6000 = 60%). Used for buyout anchor when no oracle on loan.
fields.name: ltv_bps

fields.doc: Soft cap: smallest principal the borrower will accept at match. Equals `principal_amount`\nwhen no soft cap is set (full-fund-only behavior). Borrower-only match path activates\nwhen `min_principal_amount <= total_assets < principal_amount` (see `lending_vault::execute_match`).
fields.name: min_principal_amount

udt_struct_v0.doc: Bundled args for `lending_vault::initialize` \xe2\x80\x94 keeps the entrypoint under Soroban's 10-arg limit\nafter `min_capacity` was added. Constructed by `lending_vault_factory::deploy_vault`.
udt_struct_v0.name: VaultInitParams

udt_struct_v0.doc: Schedule step: at repayment, elapsed loan time selects the active tier via `from_seconds`.\n`rate_bps` is basis points of **principal** owed for that tier\xe2\x80\x94not APR/APY (no annualization).
udt_struct_v0.name: InterestRateTier

udt_struct_v0.doc: Packed oracle + liquidation price for `create_loan` (Soroban 10-arg limit).
udt_struct_v0.name: OracleLiquidation

cases.doc: `share_name` / `share_symbol` length or emptiness (same rules as factory / offer book).
cases.name: InvalidShareMetadata

cases.doc: No pending upgrade has been proposed.
cases.name: NoPendingUpgrade

cases.doc: Upgrade timelock has not yet expired.
cases.name: UpgradeTimelockActive

cases.doc: `create_request` called while the borrower whitelist is enabled and the creator is not listed.
cases.name: BorrowerNotWhitelisted

cases.doc: `match_request` received a `principal_amount` outside the request's allowed band:\nEOA path requires equality with `request.principal_amount`; vault path requires\n`request.min_principal_amount <= principal_amount <= request.principal_amount`.
cases.name: InvalidPrincipalAmount

cases.doc: Borrow request creator cannot be the lender on their own request \xe2\x80\x94 symmetric to\n`LendingVaultError::BorrowerCannotDeposit`. Blocks both direct self-match and the\nzero-cost rug-pull where a borrower drains LP capital from their own vault.
cases.name: BorrowerCannotLend

cases.doc:
Whitelisted oracle returned a non-positive `price` (`<= 0`). All collateralization,
buyout, and liquidation math assumes positive prices; a negative or zero quote
would invert sign on collateral value or zero-divide later, so reject at the
boundary instead of trusting downstream math to catch it.
cases.name: OraclePriceInvalid

cases.doc:
`match_request` called at or after `created_at + funding_window_seconds`. The
funding window is the borrower's advertised matching cutoff; past it, the request
is unwindable via `expire_unfunded_offer` and must not be turned into a live loan.
Symmetric to `FundingWindowActive = 222` (returned by `expire_unfunded_offer`
before the deadline) \xe2\x80\x94 together they form a clean boundary at the deadline.
cases.name: FundingWindowExpired

cases.doc: Pulled amount from settlement engine did not match balance delta (fee-on-transfer or auth bug).
cases.name: DefaultCollateralTransferMismatch

cases.doc: Cannot sweep the vault contract's own share ledger address.
cases.name: CannotSweepShareToken

cases.doc: Borrow request creator cannot deposit into the vault for their own request.
cases.name: BorrowerCannotDeposit

cases.doc: `execute_match` called when `total_assets < min_capacity` \xe2\x80\x94 soft cap not yet reached.
cases.name: SoftCapNotReached

cases.doc: `deposit` / `mint` called while the offer book's lender whitelist is enabled and the depositor is not listed.
cases.name: LenderNotWhitelisted

fields.doc: Soft cap; equals `max_capacity` when no soft cap was configured on the borrow request.
fields.name: min_capacity

fields.doc: Lending vault contract: OpenZeppelin `FungibleToken` + `Vault` share ledger and metadata (`name` / `symbol` / `decimals`) live at this address \xe2\x80\x94 use it as the **token contract id** for listings (CoinGecko, etc.), DEX pools, and wallets.
fields.name: vault

fields.doc: Soft cap (smallest principal accepted at match). Equals `principal_amount` when no\nsoft cap was configured at creation; can be lowered via `offer_book::set_min_principal_amount`.
fields.name: min_principal_amount
